zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Stanford於大約1220年出生時，她的父親William Stanford31歲，母親Joan De Vivonia31歲。她於1249年9月與Reginald FitzPiers在威爾士結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1265年10月24日之後在英國威爾斯布雷康史爾布雷可諾可。

nameMeanings.name: Stanford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places so called, including Stanford (Bedfordshire, Kent), Stanford Dingley and Stanford in the Vale (Berkshire), Stanford le Hope and Stanford Rivers (Essex), Stanford Bishop and Stanford Regis (Herefordshire), Stanford on Avon (Northamptonshire), Stanford on Soar (Nottinghamshire), and Stanford on Teme (Worcestershire); also from Stamford (Lincolnshire, Northumberland), Stamford Bridge (East Yorkshire), and Standford in Headley (Hampshire), all of which appear as Stanford in medieval documents. The placenames all derive from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + ford ‘ford’. This surname has been established in Ireland since the 16th century, where it is also found under the variant Stankard.

History: An early bearer of this surname in North America, Thomas Stanford of England, settled in Charlestown, MA, in the mid 17th century and started a family line that includes Leland Stanford (1824–93), the railroad developer who was governor of CA, a US senator, and the founding benefactor of Stanford University.

variants.name: Stanforth
meanings: mainly a variant of   Stanford  , which may have migrated to North Yorkshire and Northumberland from Norfolk and Suffolk by the North Sea coastal trade.

variants.name: Standford
meanings: English: variant, with intrusive -d-, of   Stanford  . Compare   Standiford  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Stanford was born about 1220, her father, William Stanford, was 31 and her mother, Joan De Vivonia, was 31. She married Reginald FitzPiers in September 1249, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. She died after 24 October 1265, in Brecknock, Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Stanford est née environ 1220, son père, William Stanford, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Joan De Vivonia, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Reginald FitzPiers en septembre 1249, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée après 24 octobre 1265, à Brecknock, Breconshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Stanford um 1220 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Stanford 31 und ihre Mutter Joan De Vivonia 31. Sie hat im September 1249 in Wales Reginald FitzPiers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Sie starb nach 24. Oktober 1265 in Brecknock, Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Stanford(이)가 대략 1220년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Stanford(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan De Vivonia(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1249년 9월 웨일스에서 Reginald FitzPiers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1265년 10월 24일 이후 영국 웨일스 브레콘실르 브레c노크에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Stanford nasceu aproximadamente 1220, seu pai, William Stanford, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Joan De Vivonia, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Reginald FitzPiers em setembro de 1249, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu após 24 de outubro de 1265, em Brecknock, Breconshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Stanford родилась около 1220 г., её отцу по имени William Stanford было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Joan De Vivonia, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Reginald FitzPiers сентябрь 1249 г. в местности Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Она умерла после 24 октябрь 1265 г. в местности бреккнокк, брекуншир, Уэльс, Великобритания.
